title: Santa Barbara Trip
subtitle: My first time going to California, yet on a rainy day
summary: I was in my tedious searching for my first job out of Cornell, yet the return offer from the summer internship was pending. It was a trip reimbursed by a company onsite, and Santa Babara was truly a beautiful city.

blocks.text: It was an interesting company based in this touristy town outside of Los Angeles area. The city was all in Spanish colonial style, said to be enforced by the local law. I remember that the court was very picturistic, the mission was an interesting history classroom, where I first learned that California is a state of missions.
